headline: DaVita’s (NYSE:DVA) Q1 CY2026: Beats On Revenue
summary: Dialysis provider DaVita Inc. (NYSE:DVA) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 6% year on year to $3.42 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.87 per share was 23.2% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: DaVita lifts annual profit forecast on strong demand for dialysis services
summary: DaVita on Tuesday raised itsforecast for annual adjusted profit after beating Wall Streetestimates for first-quarter results, betting on steady demandfor its kidney dialysis services. ...
